name: Abdurrahman ibn Mas'ud
title: Repentant Youth
shortDescription: The brave son of Mas'ud ibn Hajjaj who defected from Umar Sa'd's army with his father, joined the Imam, and was martyred.
fullStory:
Abdurrahman ibn Mas'ud was the young and pious son of Mas'ud ibn Hajjaj al-Taymi. Like his father, he was enamored with the Ahl al-Bayt (AS), but the oppressive conditions in Kufa forced them to come to Karbala with Umar Sa'd's army.

In coordination with his father, at an opportune moment and away from the eyes of Kufan spies, Abdurrahman escaped from Umar Sa'd's camp and joined the camp of truth, Imam Hussain's (AS) camp.

On the morning of Ashura, when Umar Sa'd's army launched their cowardly collective attack (known as the first attack), Abdurrahman stood manfully against them shoulder to shoulder with his father and the other brave Ansar.

After a long battle and defending the sanctuary of Wilayah, this brave youth was martyred alongside his father in that very first attack due to enemy arrows and sword strikes, going to meet his Lord with a bright face.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلى مَسْعُودِ بْنِ الحَجّاجِ وَابْنِهِ...
quote: (From Ziyarat Nahiya:) Peace be upon Mas'ud ibn Hajjaj and his son.
